summary: Tests cover core algorithm logic (glob matching, label assignment, priority ordering, deduplication) and GitHub Actions workflow structure well, but have significant gaps: (1) CLI integration (ChangedFilesPath, OutputPath parameters, stdin reading) untested; (2) Edge cases missing (empty file lists, special characters in paths, case sensitivity, workflow failure paths); (3) Output parsing assumes specific format ('LABEL:' lines) without validating workflow implementation actually produces it; (4) E2E tests rely on fragile string matching against workflow output; (5) No validation that rules.json is correctly loaded and applied in the workflow; (6) Missing error scenarios in CLI and workflow. The test suite would catch basic regressions in the core algorithm but would likely miss integration issues and real-world edge cases when the workflow runs.
